'''鈭歝h-m-b-k''' ('''kachambekoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:locomote|locomote]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-m-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:locomote|locomote]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歝h-m-b-k
|-
! Lemma
| kachambekoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thichambekoko|thichambekoko]] || [[word:jichambekoko|jichambekoko]] || [[word:shichambekoko|shichambekoko]] || [[word:kichambekoko|kichambekoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
